channel.title: Decompile on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Decompile on TLDRBins

item.title: Android
item.description: Tool apktool jadx Unpack .apk # Get .smali files apktool d app.apk # Get .java files jadx app.apk

item.title: Python Decompile
item.description: pyinstxtractor # Unpack pyinstaller packed binary pyinstxtractor test.elf uncompyle6 # Install pip3 install uncompyle6 # Run (need .pyc extension) uncompyle6 script.pyc pycdc Installation pycdc git clone https://github.com/zrax/pycdc.git cd pycdc cmake . make make check Run ./pycdc script.pyc
